feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,628Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 568

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne

  • Domestic Fluff

entry.title: Don't Cut It Off
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,355Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: When a mission goes sideways and leaves Batman with a severe compound fracture, Superman flies him back to the Watchtower in a panic. Half-delirious from high-grade Wayne-Tech painkillers, Bruce begs Clark not to cut "it" off. Clark thinks Bruce is talking about his leg. Bruce is actually talking about his multi-million-dollar, custom-engineered, seamless Bat-suit. What follows is an eight-second laser-vision disaster, a terrifyingly high-pitched "Nothing!" from the Man of Steel, and the ultimate realization that the World's Greatest Detective cares a lot more about his hard work than a broken bone. Bruce is going to murder him—if the painkillers don't knock him out first.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Merboy
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,245Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: “You know,” Clark said slowly, putting his hand on his hips. “I am, trying to help!” The boy immediately bared his sharp teeth, letting out a low growl, and glared at Clark. “Look— it’s either you want me to help or you can stay stuck here forever,” Clark threatened knowing the fact that he would never do that. The boy folded his arms, his eyes glancing at the rock trapping him as he sat silent. - Or, an AU where Bruce is a merman and secretly childhood friends with Clark. But then Bruce disappeared ever since he told Clark about the death of his parents, yet Clark still waited, for years.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,745Chapters: 1/15Kudos: 1

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

entry.title: By Chance
entry.summary:
Author: pusheenlover69

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,482Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: Bruce wasn't in trouble at all, Clark realized. His own heart was now racing. Clark's eyes went wide, and a red flush flooded his skin, leaving him hot all over. He could hear Bruce huffing so vividly; he could almost feel the warm breath against his neck.orWhilst attempting to complete his nightly routine where he listens in on his loved ones to make sure they’re safe, Clark hears Bruce jerking off and joins him.

entry.title: Need Help?
entry.summary:
Author: Dame_RID

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,941Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 65

Summary: Bruce Wayne is sponsoring a new superhero movie about Powerman, who looks a bit too much like Superman. The film is projected to be a huge hit, but right before its release, a couple of internet sleuths dig up old tweets from the scandalous billionaire. In them, Bruce clearly didn't hold back his words when describing everyone's favorite superhero. The public is demanding an apology, but Superman wants something else entirely.

entry.title: Why doesn’t he want me, man?
entry.summary:
Author: BeelzebubsBois

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,830Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 240

Summary: After another fight between the dark knight and his son, during a particularly stressful night of patrol, Damian runs away to Dick’s house to ask for help. Long term help.Damian, Dick, and Wally learn to navigate life as a family with the help of Wally’s dads, Dick’s siblings, and a lot of trial and even more errors.But they never give up on the life they know they can build for themselves.

entry.title: united states v. alexander luthor
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,191Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 446

Summary: “Alright, people, look alive, time for assignments.” Clark turns in his chair as Perry starts doling out assignments, only half-paying attention until his name is called. “Kent, you’ve got the Luthor trial.” Clark blinks, then feels all of the blood drain out of his face. -------------- Nearly a year after the events that saw Metropolis and the entire world almost torn in two, the federal trial of Lex Luthor begins. Clark is assigned to cover the trial.

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,099Chapters: 30/30Kudos: 1,808

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.AKA: A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background and I burn through kinks faster than a sorority freshman. Seriously, I’m running out of ideas, leave a comment with a suggestion and I’ll see what I can do.AKA: That time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.
